# kubernetes.recipes

> A collection of 1056 practical Kubernetes recipes, guides, and troubleshooting articles.
> Covering networking, storage, security, deployments, observability, troubleshooting, autoscaling, configuration, Helm, and AI/GPU workloads.
> By Luca Berton.

## About

kubernetes.recipes is a comprehensive knowledge base for Kubernetes operators, SREs, and platform engineers.
Each recipe includes a quick answer, problem statement, solution with YAML/code examples, common issues, and best practices.

- Total recipes: 1056
- Categories: 10
- Updated: 2026-04-28

## Ai (149 recipes)

- [Agentic AI and Multi-Agent Systems](https://kubernetes.recipes/recipes/ai/agentic-ai-multiagent-kubernetes/): Deploy autonomous AI agents and multi-agent orchestration on Kubernetes. LangGraph, CrewAI, AutoGen, tool-calling agents, agent-to-agent communication.
- [Batch AI Workloads with Volcano Scheduler](https://kubernetes.recipes/recipes/ai/ai-batch-processing-volcano/): Volcano gang scheduling on Kubernetes: batch AI training, fair-share queues, minAvailable, job plugins, and GPU preemption. Complete setup guide.
- [AI Content Watermarking on Kubernetes](https://kubernetes.recipes/recipes/ai/ai-content-watermarking-kubernetes/): Deploy AI-generated content watermarking on Kubernetes. Invisible watermarks, SynthID integration, detection APIs, image and text watermarking pipelines.
- [AI Infrastructure Cost Optimization](https://kubernetes.recipes/recipes/ai/ai-infrastructure-cost-optimization-kubernetes/): Optimize AI infrastructure costs on Kubernetes. GPU sharing, spot instances, inference batching, model quantization, token economics.
- [AI-Native Development Platforms on Kubernetes](https://kubernetes.recipes/recipes/ai/ai-native-development-kubernetes/): Build AI-native development platforms on Kubernetes. AI coding agents, automated testing, Copilot infrastructure, dev containers, and AI-driven CI/CD pipelines.
- ... and 144 more

## Autoscaling (37 recipes)

- [Kubernetes Cluster Autoscaler Setup Guide](https://kubernetes.recipes/recipes/autoscaling/cluster-autoscaler-setup/): Configure the Cluster Autoscaler to automatically add and remove nodes based on pod scheduling demands. Covers AWS, GKE, Azure, and bare-metal setups.
- [How to Configure Cluster Autoscaler](https://kubernetes.recipes/recipes/autoscaling/cluster-autoscaler/): Automatically scale your Kubernetes cluster nodes based on workload demand. Learn to configure Cluster Autoscaler for AWS, GCP, and Azure.
- [HPA in K8s: Horizontal Pod Autoscaler Guide](https://kubernetes.recipes/recipes/autoscaling/horizontal-pod-autoscaler/): HPA in Kubernetes explained with YAML examples. Configure Horizontal Pod Autoscaler for CPU, memory, and custom metrics with scaling policies and VPA compa.
- [How to Scale Based on Custom Metrics](https://kubernetes.recipes/recipes/autoscaling/hpa-custom-metrics/): Configure Horizontal Pod Autoscaler with custom and external metrics. Learn to scale on application-specific metrics like queue depth and request latency.
- [Karpenter Node Autoscaling for K8s on AWS](https://kubernetes.recipes/recipes/autoscaling/karpenter-node-autoscaling-kubernetes/): Deploy Karpenter for fast, flexible node autoscaling on AWS EKS. Configure NodePools, EC2NodeClasses, consolidation.
- ... and 32 more

## Configuration (168 recipes)

- [Manage K8s API Versions and Deprecations](https://kubernetes.recipes/recipes/configuration/api-versions-deprecations/): Handle Kubernetes API version changes and deprecations. Migrate resources to stable APIs and ensure cluster upgrade compatibility.
- [ClusterPolicy MOFED Upgrade Strategy](https://kubernetes.recipes/recipes/configuration/clusterpolicy-mofed-upgrade/): Configure safe MOFED driver upgrade policies in the NVIDIA GPU Operator ClusterPolicy with rolling updates, node draining, and rollback procedures.
- [Fix ConfigMap Changes Not Applied to Pods](https://kubernetes.recipes/recipes/configuration/configmap-hot-reload-troubleshooting/): Debug ConfigMap updates not reflected in running pods. Covers volume mount propagation delays, env var immutability, and sidecar-based reload strategies.
- [Manage ConfigMaps and Secrets Effectively](https://kubernetes.recipes/recipes/configuration/configmap-secrets-management/): Master Kubernetes ConfigMaps and Secrets for application configuration. Learn creation methods, mounting strategies, and security best practices.
- [Configure ClusterPolicy kernelModuleType GP...](https://kubernetes.recipes/recipes/configuration/configure-clusterpolicy-kernel-module-type/): Understand and configure the driver.kernelModuleType field in the NVIDIA GPU Operator ClusterPolicy to choose between auto, open, and proprietary kernel.
- ... and 163 more

## Deployments (210 recipes)

- [How to Implement A/B Testing with Kubernetes](https://kubernetes.recipes/recipes/deployments/ab-testing-kubernetes/): Route traffic between application versions for A/B testing. Use service mesh, ingress, and custom routing rules to validate features with real users.
- [Air-Gapped Image Import for OpenShift Clusters](https://kubernetes.recipes/recipes/deployments/air-gapped-image-import-openshift/): Import container images into disconnected OpenShift clusters. Use podman save/load and internal registries when DNS and TLS block external pulls.
- [Air-Gapped OpenShift with Quay Mirror](https://kubernetes.recipes/recipes/deployments/airgapped-openshift-quay-mirror/): Deploy OpenShift in air-gapped environments with local Quay registry mirror, ImageDigestMirrorSet, and custom CatalogSources.
- [Argo Workflows on Kubernetes](https://kubernetes.recipes/recipes/deployments/argo-workflows-kubernetes/): Production guide for argo workflows on kubernetes. Step-by-step YAML examples, common issues, and best practices for K8s clusters.
- [ArgoCD App of Apps Pattern](https://kubernetes.recipes/recipes/deployments/argocd-app-of-apps-pattern/): Implement the ArgoCD App of Apps pattern to manage multiple applications from a parent Application for cluster bootstrapping.
- ... and 205 more

## Helm (43 recipes)

- [ArgoCD App of Apps with Helm Values](https://kubernetes.recipes/recipes/helm/argocd-app-of-apps-helm-values/): Use the ArgoCD App of Apps pattern with Helm value overrides per environment, enabling templated Application manifests and DRY multi-environment configurations.
- [Helm before-hook-creation Hook](https://kubernetes.recipes/recipes/helm/helm-before-hook-creation/): Use Helm before-hook-creation for database migrations and pre-install checks. Complete hook lifecycle, delete policies, and ordering.
- [How to Create and Use Helm Charts](https://kubernetes.recipes/recipes/helm/helm-chart-basics/): Master Helm, the Kubernetes package manager. Learn to create charts, manage releases, and template your deployments for reusability.
- [How to Create Helm Charts from Scratch](https://kubernetes.recipes/recipes/helm/helm-chart-creation/): Build custom Helm charts for your applications. Learn chart structure, templates, values, dependencies, and best practices for packaging Kubernetes.
- [Helm Chart Dependencies Guide](https://kubernetes.recipes/recipes/helm/helm-chart-dependencies-guide/): Manage Helm chart dependencies and subcharts. Condition flags, tags, import-values, alias patterns, and dependency update workflow for K8s.
- ... and 38 more

## Networking (119 recipes)

- [Configure SR-IOV agent-config.yaml Device b...](https://kubernetes.recipes/recipes/networking/agent-config-device-by-path/): Use agent-config.yaml to select network devices by PCI path for SR-IOV VF creation, ensuring deterministic NIC targeting across OpenShift nodes.
- [cert-manager Cloudflare DNS01 K8s](https://kubernetes.recipes/recipes/networking/cert-manager-cloudflare-dns01-k8s/): Configure cert-manager with Cloudflare DNS01 challenge for wildcard TLS certificates on Kubernetes. API token secret, ClusterIssuer, and auto-renewal.
- [Cilium ClusterMesh Multi-Cluster](https://kubernetes.recipes/recipes/networking/cilium-clustermesh-multicluster/): Connect multiple K8s clusters with Cilium ClusterMesh. Shared services, global service discovery, and cross-cluster network policies.
- [Cilium eBPF Gateway API Hubble k3s](https://kubernetes.recipes/recipes/networking/cilium-ebpf-gateway-api-hubble-k3s/): Install Cilium with eBPF dataplane, Gateway API support, and Hubble observability on k3s. Replace kube-proxy with eBPF, configure GatewayClass.
- [Cilium Service Mesh: eBPF-Powered Kubernetes](https://kubernetes.recipes/recipes/networking/cilium-service-mesh-kubernetes/): Deploy Cilium service mesh on Kubernetes with eBPF. Sidecar-free mTLS, L7 traffic management, network policies, Hubble observability, and Gateway API support.
- ... and 114 more

## Observability (46 recipes)

- [How to Configure Alertmanager for K8s Alerts](https://kubernetes.recipes/recipes/observability/alertmanager-configuration/): Set up Alertmanager to route, group, and deliver Kubernetes alerts. Learn to configure Slack, PagerDuty, and email notifications.
- [How to Set Up Alertmanager for Prometheus](https://kubernetes.recipes/recipes/observability/alertmanager-setup/): Configure Alertmanager to route and manage Prometheus alerts. Set up notification channels including Slack, PagerDuty, and email with routing rules.
- [Cilium Hubble Observability Guide](https://kubernetes.recipes/recipes/observability/cilium-hubble-observability-guide/): Monitor Kubernetes network flows with Cilium Hubble. CLI usage, Hubble UI, flow filtering, DNS visibility, and L7 HTTP observability.
- [How to Implement Container Logging Patterns](https://kubernetes.recipes/recipes/observability/container-logging-patterns/): Configure logging for Kubernetes applications. Implement sidecar logging, log aggregation, and structured logging best practices.
- [Implement Distributed Tracing with Jaeger](https://kubernetes.recipes/recipes/observability/distributed-tracing-jaeger/): Deploy Jaeger for distributed tracing in Kubernetes. Learn to instrument applications, trace requests across services, and identify performance.
- ... and 41 more

## Security (120 recipes)

- [How to Create Admission Webhooks](https://kubernetes.recipes/recipes/security/admission-webhooks/): Build validating and mutating admission webhooks to enforce policies and modify resources. Implement custom admission controllers for Kubernetes.
- [AI ML Security and Compliance Kubernetes](https://kubernetes.recipes/recipes/security/ai-ml-security-compliance-kubernetes/): Secure AI and ML workloads on Kubernetes with model encryption, data governance, audit logging, network isolation for training jobs.
- [AI Security Platforms on Kubernetes](https://kubernetes.recipes/recipes/security/ai-security-platform-kubernetes/): Secure AI workloads on Kubernetes. Model supply chain security, prompt injection defense, LLM output filtering, AI RBAC, GPU isolation.
- [How to Configure Kubernetes API Access Control](https://kubernetes.recipes/recipes/security/api-access-control/): Set up secure API server access with authentication and authorization. Configure RBAC, API groups, and audit logging for cluster security.
- [Manage K8s Certificates with cert-manager](https://kubernetes.recipes/recipes/security/cert-manager-certificates/): Automate TLS certificate management with cert-manager. Configure issuers, request certificates from Let's Encrypt, and enable automatic renewal.
- ... and 115 more

## Storage (60 recipes)

- [Access Zones on Scale-Out NAS for Kubernetes](https://kubernetes.recipes/recipes/storage/access-zones-scaleout-nas-kubernetes/): Configure access zones on scale-out NAS (Dell PowerScale/Isilon) for Kubernetes persistent storage. Multi-tenant isolation, CSI driver setup.
- [CNPG Disaster Recovery and Replication](https://kubernetes.recipes/recipes/storage/cnpg-disaster-recovery/): Set up cross-region PostgreSQL disaster recovery with CloudNativePG using replica clusters, WAL shipping, and automated failover.
- [How to Configure CSI Drivers for Storage](https://kubernetes.recipes/recipes/storage/csi-drivers-storage/): Install and configure Container Storage Interface (CSI) drivers for cloud and on-premises storage. Set up dynamic provisioning with AWS EBS, GCP PD, and.
- [CSI Snapshot and Restore K8s Guide](https://kubernetes.recipes/recipes/storage/csi-snapshot-restore-guide/): Create and restore volume snapshots with CSI on K8s. VolumeSnapshot, VolumeSnapshotClass, and cross-namespace clone patterns.
- [Distributed fio Storage Benchmark K8s](https://kubernetes.recipes/recipes/storage/distributed-fio-kubernetes-openshift/): Run distributed fio benchmarks on Kubernetes and OpenShift to test storage performance at scale. Covers fio-distributed with k8s Jobs, Red Hat dbench.
- ... and 55 more

## Troubleshooting (104 recipes)

- [Fix API Server Timeout and Overload](https://kubernetes.recipes/recipes/troubleshooting/api-server-timeout-troubleshooting/): Debug kubectl timeouts, API server overload, and connection refused errors. Covers etcd latency, webhook timeouts, and rate limiting.
- [Check Bonding and Interface Status for SR-IOV](https://kubernetes.recipes/recipes/troubleshooting/check-bonding-and-interface-status/): Inspect bond membership, interface state, and link aggregation to confirm which NICs can be correctly targeted by SR-IOV network policies on Kubernetes.
- [Cilium Debug Pod Troubleshooting](https://kubernetes.recipes/recipes/troubleshooting/cilium-debug-pod-troubleshooting/): Debug Kubernetes networking with Cilium debug pods and containers. cilium-dbg, netshoot, hubble observe, and endpoint connectivity troubleshooting.
- [Fix ConfigMap Too Large Error](https://kubernetes.recipes/recipes/troubleshooting/configmap-too-large-error/): Resolve the 1MB ConfigMap size limit error. Split configs, use Secrets for binary data, mount volumes, or use external stores.
- [Fix CoreDNS Resolution Failures in Kubernetes](https://kubernetes.recipes/recipes/troubleshooting/coredns-troubleshooting/): Debug DNS resolution failures in Kubernetes pods. Covers CoreDNS crashes, NXDOMAIN errors, ndots configuration, and upstream DNS timeouts.
- ... and 99 more
